responsibilities: Design and train computer vision models for object detection, segmentation, and classification tasks at scale
Build and optimize image processing pipelines that handle real-time video and camera feed inputs
Fine-tune pretrained vision models such as YOLO and Detectron2 on domain-specific labeled datasets
Quantize and optimize vision models for low-latency inference on edge devices and embedded hardware
Develop data annotation and labeling workflows to curate high-quality training datasets for vision tasks
Collaborate with hardware and robotics teams to integrate vision models into perception systems
Evaluate model accuracy, precision, and recall against benchmark datasets and real-world test scenarios
Implement data augmentation and synthetic data generation techniques to improve model robustness
Deploy vision models to production using TensorRT and ONNX pipelines for GPU-accelerated inference
Debug and resolve false positive and false negative detection issues in production vision systems
